TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu maki lingay na rgrgyax sa qalang Pyaway, trang ini k'usa squ yulung lga. stliqun ku nya yaya mu ru thwayun ku nya pstuliq, trang nasa ga. mpitu kawas maku na'. "tuliq la! Sabi. musa ta rgyax la." mgrgul saku roziq mu ru mkucyu saku. mhuyaq sokan cikay kuki te tanux, cyux qmuzi l'uy squ ruma na'. mpanga kiri qu yaya, qmtuy cipuq qba maku ru skluw lukus ni yaya maku, mluw saku yaya mzyup sa hlahuy ruma, qmpul squ skura tuqi na Tayax. kahul sami squ qalang Pyaway, hminas ka khmay na hlahuy ruma, ska tuqi maki l'uy htagan na shera, mhuyaq ru tltu qplan. hnya'an na qbhniq s'unan sa ska hlahuy ru smbih sami musa tuqi na rgyax. tpucing saku rapal ni yaya maku, mtuqi squ tuqi, kahul squ gasuq na ruma srpus squ wagi, tnaq balay king qsya'an sa babaw uraw. maki qutux betunux na kperay, tpru sa turu qba maku ru wal mlaka lozi. mhkangi sami ru pqutan mu yaya mha,"aya, nu'un ta musa rgyax? " shbyeh tunux ni yaya mu ru ktan ku nya msyaq mha:"musa ta tmuya singut bobaw ngahi sehuy qcyenā€¦mha sqani lga, maki squ blaq na nniqun la." si pyax pyax ssyax squ roziq nya, miyang squ l'uy na sasan tnaq smyax balay. ini maku baqi nanu, ana ga, baqun maku, ryax soni qani ga musa sami mtizyuwaw qutux iyat balay kinqiri na zyuwaw. tehuq squ Tayax lga, syun ku nya sasaw yaya mu, mpala squ tunux nya ru meng squ payax. t'aring qmumah qmayeh qu yaya mu. s'utu nya squ mkyay na qhuniq ru k'man ru lmon nya, kmal yaya mha, qani ga, snbil ni binkisan ta. s'gal nya puniq lomun nya k'man, ini khopa puniq qasa, ana ga, tnaq squ insuna nyux mstoput. ms'urux saku sa syaw, ktan maku mqalux na uraw nyux thway msheloq, masuq lmon kwara k'mam lga, musa blaq balay uraw na rhiyal, thuyay pmuhi pizyux balay na pinbahuw. qmtuy qba mu ru meng saku cipuq payat mu nanak, mqas balay ru mnkux inlungan maku, qani ga mtxal saku rmaw pmuhi ghap. rmaw saku gmhap, ktan maku qutux qutux ghap mzyup ru 'mbul squ zik na uraw. :: "aya, miyang sqani qutux ghap balay baq phtuw cingay na nniqun ga? " "aw ay, thuyay su ru smoya su mlahang hiya ga, nanu baq ssyukan su nya la " hngyang nya ga mhway ru mhnuk balay, ana ga baqun maku, qasa ga pira kawas tnuhi nya qmayat nqu srhuw. behuy ga kahul squ rgrgyax mwah yupan,
S.PHON: Ī²niru:s~É•aĪ²i noĪ²u maki liÅ‹aj na rÉ£rÉ£jax s~É•a qalaÅ‹ pjawaj, traÅ‹ ini kŹ”us~É•a s~É•qu juluÅ‹ lÉ£a. s~É•tliqun ku nja jaja mu ru tÄ§wajun ku nja ps~É•tuliq, traÅ‹ nas~É•a É£a. mpitu kawas~É• maku naŹ”. "tuliq la! s~É•aĪ²i. mus~É•a ta rÉ£jax la." mÉ£rÉ£ul s~É•aku roziq mu ru mkuŹ¦~ŹØju s~É•aku. mÄ§ujaq s~É•okan Ź¦~ŹØikaj kuki te tanux, Ź¦~ŹØjux qmuzi lŹ”uj s~É•qu ruma naŹ”. mpaÅ‹a kiri qu jaja, qmtuj Ź¦~ŹØipuq qĪ²a maku ru s~É•kluw lukus~É• ni jaja maku, mluw s~É•aku jaja mzjup s~É•a Ä§laÄ§uj ruma, qmpul s~É•qu s~É•kura tuqi na tajax. kaÄ§ul s~É•ami s~É•qu qalaÅ‹ pjawaj, Ä§minas~É• ka kÄ§maj na Ä§laÄ§uj ruma, s~É•ka tuqi maki lŹ”uj Ä§taÉ£an na s~É•Ä§era, mÄ§ujaq ru tltu qplan. Ä§njaŹ”an na qĪ²Ä§niq s~É•Ź”unan s~É•a s~É•ka Ä§laÄ§uj ru s~É•mĪ²iÄ§ s~É•ami mus~É•a tuqi na rÉ£jax. tpuŹ¦~ŹØiÅ‹ s~É•aku rapal ni jaja maku, mtuqi s~É•qu tuqi, kaÄ§ul s~É•qu É£as~É•uq na ruma s~É•rpus~É• s~É•qu waÉ£i, tnaq Ī²alaj kiÅ‹ qs~É•jaŹ”an s~É•a Ī²aĪ²aw uraw. maki qutux Ī²etunux na kperaj, tpru s~É•a turu qĪ²a maku ru wal mlaka lozi. mÄ§kaÅ‹i s~É•ami ru pqutan mu jaja mÄ§a,"aja, nuŹ”un ta mus~É•a rÉ£jax? " s~É•Ä§Ī²jeÄ§ tunux ni jaja mu ru ktan ku nja ms~É•jaq mÄ§a:"mus~É•a ta tmuja s~É•iÅ‹ut Ī²oĪ²aw Å‹aÄ§i s~É•eÄ§uj qŹ¦~ŹØjen*mÄ§a s~É•qani lÉ£a, maki s~É•qu Ī²laq na nniqun la." s~É•i pjax pjax s~É•s~É•jax s~É•qu roziq nja, mijaÅ‹ s~É•qu lŹ”uj na s~É•as~É•an tnaq s~É•mjax Ī²alaj. ini maku Ī²aqi nanu, ana É£a, Ī²aqun maku, rjax s~É•oni qani É£a mus~É•a s~É•ami mtizjuwaw qutux ijat Ī²alaj kinqiri na zjuwaw. teÄ§uq s~É•qu tajax lÉ£a, s~É•jun ku nja s~É•as~É•aw jaja mu, mpala s~É•qu tunux nja ru meÅ‹ s~É•qu pajax. tŹ”ariÅ‹ qmumaÄ§ qmajeÄ§ qu jaja mu. s~É•Ź”utu nja s~É•qu mkjaj na qÄ§uniq ru kŹ”man ru lmon nja, kmal jaja mÄ§a, qani É£a, s~É•nĪ²il ni Ī²inkis~É•an ta. s~É•Ź”É£al nja puniq lomun nja kŹ”man, ini kÄ§opa puniq qas~É•a, ana É£a, tnaq s~É•qu ins~É•una njux ms~É•toput. ms~É•Ź”urux s~É•aku s~É•a s~É•jaw, ktan maku mqalux na uraw njux tÄ§waj ms~É•Ä§eloq, mas~É•uq lmon kwara kŹ”mam lÉ£a, mus~É•a Ī²laq Ī²alaj uraw na rÄ§ijal, tÄ§ujaj pmuÄ§i pizjux Ī²alaj na pinĪ²aÄ§uw. qmtuj qĪ²a mu ru meÅ‹ s~É•aku Ź¦~ŹØipuq pajat mu nanak, mqas~É• Ī²alaj ru mnkux inluÅ‹an maku, qani É£a mtxal s~É•aku rmaw pmuÄ§i É£Ä§ap. rmaw s~É•aku É£mÄ§ap, ktan maku qutux qutux É£Ä§ap mzjup ru Ź”mĪ²ul s~É•qu zik na uraw. :: "aja, mijaÅ‹ s~É•qani qutux É£Ä§ap Ī²alaj Ī²aq pÄ§tuw Ź¦~ŹØiÅ‹aj na nniqun É£a? " "aw aj, tÄ§ujaj s~É•u ru s~É•moja s~É•u mlaÄ§aÅ‹ Ä§ija É£a, nanu Ī²aq s~É•s~É•jukan s~É•u nja la " Ä§Å‹jaÅ‹ nja É£a mÄ§waj ru mÄ§nuk Ī²alaj, ana É£a Ī²aqun maku, qas~É•a É£a pira kawas~É• tnuÄ§i nja qmajat nqu s~É•rÄ§uw. Ī²eÄ§uj É£a kaÄ§ul s~É•qu rÉ£rÉ£jax mwaÄ§ jupan,
S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu maki lingay na rgrgyax sa qalang Pyaway, trang ini k'usa squ yulung lga. stliqun ku nya yaya mu ru thwayun ku nya pstuliq, trang nasa ga. mpitu kawas maku na'. "tuliq la! Sabi. musa ta rgyax la." mgrgul saku roziq mu ru mkucyu saku. mhuyaq sokan cikay kuki te tanux, cyux qmuzi l'uy squ ruma na'. mpanga kiri qu yaya, qmtuy cipuq qba maku ru skluw lukus ni yaya maku, mluw saku yaya mzyup sa hlahuy ruma, qmpul squ skura tuqi na Tayax. kahul sami squ qalang Pyaway, hminas ka khmay na hlahuy ruma, ska tuqi maki l'uy htagan na shera, mhuyaq ru tltu qplan. hnya'an na qbhniq s'unan sa ska hlahuy ru smbih sami musa tuqi na rgyax. tpucing saku rapal ni yaya maku, mtuqi squ tuqi, kahul squ gasuq na ruma srpus squ wagi, tnaq balay king qsya'an sa babaw uraw. maki qutux betunux na kperay, tpru sa turu qba maku ru wal mlaka lozi. mhkangi sami ru pqutan mu yaya mha,"aya, nu'un ta musa rgyax? " shbyeh tunux ni yaya mu ru ktan ku nya msyaq mha:"musa ta tmuya singut bobaw ngahi sehuy qcyenā€¦mha sqani lga, maki squ blaq na nniqun la." si pyax pyax ssyax squ roziq nya, miyang squ l'uy na sasan tnaq smyax balay. ini maku baqi nanu, ana ga, baqun maku, ryax soni qani ga musa sami mtizyuwaw qutux iyat balay kinqiri na zyuwaw. tehuq squ Tayax lga, syun ku nya sasaw yaya mu, mpala squ tunux nya ru meng squ payax. t'aring qmumah qmayeh qu yaya mu. s'utu nya squ mkyay na qhuniq ru k'man ru lmon nya, kmal yaya mha, qani ga, snbil ni binkisan ta. s'gal nya puniq lomun nya k'man, ini khopa puniq qasa, ana ga, tnaq squ insuna nyux mstoput. ms'urux saku sa syaw, ktan maku mqalux na uraw nyux thway msheloq, masuq lmon kwara k'mam lga, musa blaq balay uraw na rhiyal, thuyay pmuhi pizyux balay na pinbahuw. qmtuy qba mu ru meng saku cipuq payat mu nanak, mqas balay ru mnkux inlungan maku, qani ga mtxal saku rmaw pmuhi ghap. rmaw saku gmhap, ktan maku qutux qutux ghap mzyup ru 'mbul squ zik na uraw. :: "aya, miyang sqani qutux ghap balay baq phtuw cingay na nniqun ga? " "aw ay, thuyay su ru smoya su mlahang hiya ga, nanu baq ssyukan su nya la " hngyang nya ga mhway ru mhnuk balay, ana ga baqun maku, qasa ga pira kawas tnuhi nya qmayat nqu srhuw. behuy ga kahul squ rgrgyax mwah yupan,

" s~É•Ä§Ī²jeÄ§ tunux ni jaja mu ru ktan ku nja ms~É•jaq mÄ§a:"mus~É•a ta tmuja s~É•iÅ‹ut Ī²oĪ²aw Å‹aÄ§i s~É•eÄ§uj qŹ¦~ŹØjen*mÄ§a s~É•qani lÉ£a, maki s~É•qu Ī²laq na nniqun la." s~É•i pjax pjax s~É•s~É•jax s~É•qu roziq nja, mijaÅ‹ s~É•qu lŹ”uj na s~É•as~É•an tnaq s~É•mjax Ī²alaj. ini maku Ī²aqi nanu, ana É£a, Ī²aqun maku, rjax s~É•oni qani É£a mus~É•a s~É•ami mtizjuwaw qutux ijat Ī²alaj kinqiri na zjuwaw. teÄ§uq s~É•qu tajax lÉ£a, s~É•jun ku nja s~É•as~É•aw jaja mu, mpala s~É•qu tunux nja ru meÅ‹ s~É•qu pajax. tŹ”ariÅ‹ qmumaÄ§ qmajeÄ§ qu jaja mu. s~É•Ź”utu nja s~É•qu mkjaj na qÄ§uniq ru kŹ”man ru lmon nja, kmal jaja mÄ§a, qani É£a, s~É•nĪ²il ni Ī²inkis~É•an ta. s~É•Ź”É£al nja puniq lomun nja kŹ”man, ini kÄ§opa puniq qas~É•a, ana É£a, tnaq s~É•qu ins~É•una njux ms~É•toput. ms~É•Ź”urux s~É•aku s~É•a s~É•jaw, ktan maku mqalux na uraw njux tÄ§waj ms~É•Ä§eloq, mas~É•uq lmon kwara kŹ”mam lÉ£a, mus~É•a Ī²laq Ī²alaj uraw na rÄ§ijal, tÄ§ujaj pmuÄ§i pizjux Ī²alaj na pinĪ²aÄ§uw. qmtuj qĪ²a mu ru meÅ‹ s~É•aku Ź¦~ŹØipuq pajat mu nanak, mqas~É• Ī²alaj ru mnkux inluÅ‹an maku, qani É£a mtxal s~É•aku rmaw pmuÄ§i É£Ä§ap. rmaw s~É•aku É£mÄ§ap, ktan maku qutux qutux É£Ä§ap mzjup ru Ź”mĪ²ul s~É•qu zik na uraw. :: "aja, mijaÅ‹ s~É•qani qutux É£Ä§ap Ī²alaj Ī²aq pÄ§tuw Ź¦~ŹØiÅ‹aj na nniqun É£a? " "aw aj, tÄ§ujaj s~É•u ru s~É•moja s~É•u mlaÄ§aÅ‹ Ä§ija É£a, nanu Ī²aq s~É•s~É•jukan s~É•u nja la " Ä§Å‹jaÅ‹ nja É£a mÄ§waj ru mÄ§nuk Ī²alaj, ana É£a Ī²aqun maku, qas~É•a É£a pira kawas~É• tnuÄ§i nja qmajat nqu s~É•rÄ§uw. Ī²eÄ§uj É£a kaÄ§ul s~É•qu rÉ£rÉ£jax mwaÄ§ jupan,
